description: You are a film composer working at a post-production studio. You need to sketch a melodic idea using Ardour's MIDI capabilities and render it for the director to review. In the currently open Ardour session ('MyProject'), create a MIDI track named 'Tension Motif' using the 'ACE Reasonable Synth' (or any built-in synthesizer). Import the MIDI file from /home/ga/Audio/midi/tension_motif.mid onto this track and export the session audio to /home/ga/Audio/midi_render/tension_motif.wav.
